CustomField.description: This Formula tells the print button which document to print.
CustomField.formula: IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000GjVk", "a0j900000006Yni", IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000GlHo", "a0j900000006Yni", IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000GkFa", "a0j900000006Yni", IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000hfHc", "a0j90000006vqIM", IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000hurS", "a0j90000006vqIM", IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000hqdx", "a0j90000006vqIM", IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000hudi", "a0j90000006vqIM", IF(RecordTypeId = "01290000000hqd9", "a0j90000006vqIM", "a0j900000006y5r"))))))))
CustomField.label: Conga Template to use
